extraction.one_line_summary: EWAN Caleb won the uphill cobbled finish after POGAČAR attacked mid-stage with SOLER and ALAPHILIPPE to tire sprinter teams, then sat up before finale.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked 50km out with SOLER/ALAPHILIPPE explicitly to fatigue sprinter teams, then abandoned move preserving energy for stage 4.
GEOGHEGAN HART bridged to POGAČAR group while LANDA dropped, revealing climbing differential within team on sustained plateau effort.
EWAN timed final turn exceptionally late on cobbled uphill, positioned further back than DÉMARE/KOOIJ who followed GUARNIERI leadout.
GUARNIERI leadout positioned DÉMARE perfectly but EWAN's delayed sprint from third wheel overcame early launches on technical cobbled rise.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Mid-race disruption tactics to tire rivals while preserving own form shows tactical sophistication and stage 4 ambitions
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: Won technical uphill cobbled sprint with superior positioning timing despite DÉMARE having ideal leadout
rider_signals.KOOIJ Olav: positive: Third place confirms uphill sprint capacity when following correct wheel, consistently podiums without team support
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: Bridged to POGAČAR group on sustained plateau climb while LANDA failed, unexpected climbing strength signal
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Dropped from mid-race move on plateau terrain while GEOGHEGAN HART succeeded, concerning form indicator
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Out of position cited as cold-related, missing sprint opportunity on technical finish suited to experience
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: POGAČAR worked specifically for him yet finished outside top five, wasted tactical effort
